task_objective: Harden SteamUI QAM current-game context detection so React private prop/fiber scraping remains a bounded fallback while route and explicit DOM app context are preferred when available.
design_decisions: Kept React private property discovery as a best-effort fallback because no stable local Decky API exposes Home/Library focused tile context.
Moved the shared Library app route regex into a named constant and made route context the first captured SteamUI context source.
Added explicit focused DOM app-id discovery using ancestor and descendant lookup, while filtering BODY and HTML to avoid root-level scans.
Deferred appID-only DOM sessions until after React candidates so steam_id matching remains possible without blocking richer name-bearing React context.
Added named candidate, hover, and fiber-depth caps plus a visited-fiber guard for malformed React fiber chains.
results: Red static regression tests failed before implementation for missing hardening helpers and route-first capture.
Focused frontend static tests passed after implementation.
Full frontend static suite passed with 71 tests.
Full Python suite passed with 319 tests.
pnpm verify passed after rerunning with network access for npm audit.
